name: create_prow_job_run_tests_new
description: Create prow_job_run_tests_new partitioned table (LIST by prow_job_run_release)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prow_job_run_tests_new (
	id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	prow_job_run_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_release TEXT NOT NULL,
	test_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	suite_id BIGINT,
	status INT,
	duration DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PRIMARY KEY (id, prow_job_run_release, prow_job_run_timestamp)
) PARTITION BY LIST (prow_job_run_release)

name: idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_release_timestamp
description: Index on prow_job_run_tests_new for timestamp and release (timestamp first for range optimization)
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_release_timestamp ON prow_job_run_tests_new (prow_job_run_timestamp, prow_job_run_release)

name: idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_run_id
description: Index on prow_job_run_tests_new for job run lookups
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_run_id ON prow_job_run_tests_new (prow_job_run_id)

name: idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id
description: Index on prow_job_run_tests_new for test lookups
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id ON prow_job_run_tests_new (test_id)

name: idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_status
description: Index on prow_job_run_tests_new for status filtering
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_status ON prow_job_run_tests_new (status)

name: idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_id
description: Index on prow_job_run_tests_new for prow_job_id lookups
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_prow_job_id ON prow_job_run_tests_new (prow_job_id)

name: idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id_status
description: Composite index on prow_job_run_tests_new for Component Readiness queries
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_tests_new_test_id_status ON prow_job_run_tests_new (test_id, status)

name: create_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new
description: Create prow_job_run_test_outputs_new partitioned table (LIST by prow_job_run_test_release)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS prow_job_run_test_outputs_new (
	id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY,
	created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	deleted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	prow_job_run_test_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
	output TEXT,
	prow_job_run_test_timestamp TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
	prow_job_run_test_release TEXT NOT NULL,
	PRIMARY KEY (id, prow_job_run_test_release, prow_job_run_test_timestamp)
) PARTITION BY LIST (prow_job_run_test_release)

name: idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_release_timestamp
description: Index on prow_job_run_test_outputs_new for timestamp and release queries
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_release_timestamp ON prow_job_run_test_outputs_new (prow_job_run_test_timestamp, prow_job_run_test_release)

name: idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_prow_job_run_test_id
description: Index on prow_job_run_test_outputs_new for test output lookups
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_prow_job_run_test_outputs_new_prow_job_run_test_id ON prow_job_run_test_outputs_new (prow_job_run_test_id)

name: create_test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_new
description: Create test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_new partitioned table (LIST by release, sub-partitioned by RANGE on date)
query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_new (
	date TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
	test_id BIGINT,
	release TEXT NOT NULL,
	job_name TEXT,
	test_name TEXT,
	runs BIGINT,
	passes BIGINT,
	flakes BIGINT,
	failures BIGINT
) PARTITION BY LIST (release)

name: idx_test_analysis_new_test_release_date
description: Unique index matching the original test_release_date constraint
query: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_test_analysis_new_test_release_date ON test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_new (date, test_id, release, job_name)

name: idx_test_analysis_new_name_and_job
description: Index matching the original test_analysis_name_and_job index
query: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_test_analysis_new_name_and_job ON test_analysis_by_job_by_dates_new (test_name, job_name)
